name: @quantus-network/wasm
description: Quantus account derivation and ML-DSA-87 extrinsic signing, compiled from the chain's own crypto crates to WebAssembly.
author: Quantus Network

scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run build && npm run test:js
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-cargo-version.mjs && git add Cargo.toml Cargo.lock
scripts.postversion: git push --follow-tags && gh release create v$npm_package_version --generate-notes --verify-tag
